overview: A production-ready Private School Fee Management System with role-based access, modern glass UI, student management, fee billing, payment tracking, receipt generation, and analytics — built for real-world school operations.
features: Role-based access control with 4 roles: Super Admin, School Admin, Accountant, Teacher
Admin dashboard with KPI cards, charts, recent transactions, and defaulters list
Student management with photo uploads, class allocation, and fee history
Class and section management with academic year mapping
Fee structure builder with class-wise fees, installments, fine rules, and discounts
Bulk fee bill generation with auto-calculation, QR codes, and PDF export
Payment recording (cash/online/card/UPI) with partial and full payment support
Auto-generated PDF receipts with school branding and QR codes
Email notifications for due reminders, payment confirmations, and overdue alerts
Reports and analytics: daily/monthly collection, pending fees, defaulters, and exports
Dark and light mode with glass morphism design, responsive on all devices
Global search and advanced filters across all modules
